positive: A vibrant, stylized mystical forest scene with bioluminescent mushrooms and glowing flora, featuring a majestic, silhouetted wolf howling at a full moon. The style should be highly detailed digital painting mixed with clean vector graphic elements, emphasizing strong contrast and clean lines. Use deep jewel tones—sapphire blue, emerald green, and amethyst purple—highlighted by brilliant cyan and golden accents from the glowing elements. The composition should be centralized and balanced, suitable for a wearable art print, with the wolf prominently centered against the forest backdrop. Ensure the overall mood is magical, ethereal, and dramatic. Print-friendly, flat color fields and distinct silhouettes are critical. Studio lighting, high resolution, intricate detail.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, grain, watermark, signature, text, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, noisy, out of frame, disfigured, amateur, cropped, distorted colors
